In Andhra Pradesh, the state government aggressively escalated its highly publicized, massive administrative reform agenda. ## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On June 19, 1865, the massive, highly historic and incredibly profound holiday of "Juneteenth" officially and aggressively originated in Galveston, Texas. Following the absolute, bloody conclusion of the American Civil War, Union General Gordon Granger heavily arrived and officially read General Order No. 3, which aggressively proclaimed the absolute, total emancipation of all enslaved African Americans in Texas. This massive, long-delayed announcement fundamentally marked the absolute, actual end of slavery in the final Confederate state.

On June 19, 1215, the incredibly massive, highly historic document known as the *Magna Carta* was officially and heavily promulgated in England. Following intense, aggressive pressure from rebellious barons, King John formally sealed the massive charter. By aggressively stipulating that the absolute power of the reigning monarch was heavily subject to the law and guaranteeing the massive right to a fair trial, the *Magna Carta* became the absolute, foundational cornerstone of global constitutional law and massive civil liberties.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On June 19, 1908, Shivaram Hari Rajguru, the incredibly massive, deeply revered, and fiercely militant revolutionary of the Indian independence movement, was born near Pune. A brilliant marksman and a massive, foundational member of the Hindustan Socialist Republican Association (HSRA), he aggressively conspired alongside Bhagat Singh and Sukhdev to assassinate British police officer J.P. Saunders. His massive, uncompromising martyrdom via execution by the British authorities firmly cemented him as an absolute, eternal hero of India's armed freedom struggle.

On June 19, 1966, the incredibly massive, highly polarizing political leader and absolute founder of the Shiv Sena, Bal Thackeray, heavily launched his massive, iconic political cartoon weekly, *Marmik*. Utilizing his brilliant, aggressive artistic talent, he heavily utilized the publication to aggressively champion the absolute rights of native Maharashtrians, fiercely laying the massive, ideological foundation for the aggressive, regional nativism that would completely dominate the political and cultural landscape of Mumbai for decades to come.
